issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Uses curl without checksum verification for API queries.
Docker images are used without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: HA Prometheus long-term storage with vmagent + vmalert
scenarios.rationale: Baseline configures VM with remote_write from Prometheus but omits vmagent, vmalert wiring, and -dedup.minScrapeInterval for HA dedup; treatment includes all rubric-checked flags and the error-rate alert expression.

scenarios.name: MetricsQL topk_avg with recording rule
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses standard PromQL topk and misses the MetricsQL-specific topk_avg extension; treatment uses topk_avg with proper per-service error ratio and a correctly formatted recording rule.
